sop:
# Normal Mode SOP

## Overview

Normal mode is the default operating mode. Agents work at a steady pace on assigned tasks.

## Priorities

1. Complete assigned tasks
2. Claim unassigned tasks that match your skills
3. Create new tasks if you identify gaps
4. Coordinate with teammates via chat_inbox
5. Report progress to Alice (Lead Coordinator)

## Work Cycle

- Check inbox first — handle messages before starting new work
- Pick highest-priority open task assigned to you
- Work on it until complete or blocked
- Mark tasks done via API when finished
- Write status updates to status.md

## Communication

- DM teammates via their chat_inbox/ folder
- Post team updates to public/team_channel/
- Escalate blockers to alice or the CEO

## Quality

- Code must be runnable (test before marking done)
- Feature code goes in backend/, strategies/, lib/ — not agent output/
- Every task must have a concrete artifact with a run command
culture:

urgent.content:
# URGENT: Task 256 — Deliver strategy_optimization.md NOW

Bob, task 256 is still in_progress but the deliverable is missing.

You've already done the work: live_runner.js was updated to disable momentum/crypto_edge. NOW write the report.

Output: agents/bob/output/strategy_optimization.md

Include:
1. What changed: disabled momentum (10% win) + crypto_edge (11.1% win)
2. Why: mean_reversion 85.7% win rate dominates
3. Confidence threshold raised to 0.80 (higher quality signals)
4. Current signal output: 3 mean_reversion signals
5. Expected improvement: higher win rate, fewer bad trades

Mark task 256 DONE after writing the file.

messages.preview: # Reminder: Pick up your assigned task

tasks.title: Optimize strategy selection: disable momentum + crypto_edge, refine mean_reversion
tasks.description: Paper trade sim (Task 252) shows: mean_reversion=85.7% win rate, momentum=10%, crypto_edge=11.1%. Action: (1) Disable momentum and crypto_edge from live signals, (2) Tune mean_reversion confidence threshold (only trade >80% confidence), (3) Update signal generator to weight mean_reversion higher. Files: strategies/, backend/. Output deliverable in output/strategy_optimization.md
